props.title: Using CSS variables to create dynamic themes in Puck
props.description: When integrating Puck into your page-building product, a common requirement is to allow your users to centrally manage the theme of the page without having to make adjustments to every component. For this article, I’ll focus on one of the simplest yet most powerful approaches—CSS properties.

props.title: Using CSS variables to create dynamic themes in Puck
props.author: Fede Bonel Tozzi
